name: Repair Armor
description: You magically repair damaged armor or shields. The spell takes 1 minute to cast and removes one level of equipment degradation or restores minor physical damage to worn armor.
effect: Removes one level of degradation from touched armor or shield.
notes: Casting time is 1 minute — out-of-combat only; action_cost reflects combat cost if somehow cast in combat
Touch range; targets a piece of armor or shield
